name: Whole Wheat Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Blend in the sugar.
3. Mix in the beaten eggs and mashed bananas, blending until smooth.
4. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda.
5. Stir in the whole wheat flour.
6. Add the hot water alternately with the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
7. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
9. Bake at 325 degrees F (163 C) for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
